items.title: [正面] I will keep it short. PVP is not a p2w. Gacha is f...
items.summary: I will keep it short. PVP is not a p2w. Gacha is fairly generous. The translation is no longer an issue. The story is deep and meaningful. The game is not a brainless afk sh*t.  It is free, give it a try. thanks for reading bye.

items.title: [负面] -Bland Grand Jrpg plot with 90% pompous dialogue a...
items.summary:
-Bland Grand Jrpg plot with 90% pompous dialogue and 10% gameplay. World is ending, vague amorphous monsters, graves, death, memories, anime women.
-Third Party account registration.
-Always online even in battles, which with 300+ms means DELAYS on EVERY CARD ACTION.
-I kid you not, GPT translation of cards and plot.
-Cards have no art. At all. The only way to tell them apart is by name and card text. When you make a cardgame, you should probably make card art first, not soap-opera cutscenes and pointless animations.

items.title: [正面] came for the card gacha, stayed for eldritch husba...
items.summary:
came for the card gacha, stayed for eldritch husbando <3 

morimens is very fun and has lots of heart! the most common complaint about AI-translations has been acknowledged and worked on by the devs, and the story is very interesting. i've been recommending this game to everyone!!
